# Pranav Kaja

> Pranav Kaja is a Data & Analytics Engineer. He builds pipelines, models, and
> dashboards that survive contact with real data. He holds an MS in Business
> Analytics from the University of Massachusetts Amherst (GPA 4.00) and a BTech
> in Computer Science, is based in Massachusetts, and is open to full-time roles
> anywhere in the US.

## About
Pranav builds for the whole data lifecycle, clean inputs, edge cases, monitoring,
and an audit trail, favoring models that ship and get monitored over ones that
only look good on a slide.

## Pages
- [Home](https://pranavkaja.com/): Overview, experience, projects, and skills
- [Why Pranav](https://pranavkaja.com/why-pranav): The short case for working with Pranav
- [Contact](https://pranavkaja.com/contact): Email, LinkedIn, and a contact form
- [Interests](https://pranavkaja.com/interests): Interests beyond work

## Experience
- Student Supervisor, UMass Amherst Dining (Sep 2024 - May 2026): automated a
  37-location ETL pipeline, cutting manual reporting from 2 hrs/day to 12 min/day;
  led a team of student employees; built data-driven inventory forecasting.
- Data Science Intern, Acmegrade (May 2022 - Jul 2022): trained Random Forest
  and Gradient Boosting on a 100,000-record client portfolio, lifting
  conversion-prediction accuracy 15% over baseline.

## Skills
- Data Engineering: SQL, ETL/ELT, Python, Spark & Hadoop, Data Warehousing
- Analytics & BI: Power BI, Tableau, Power Query, KPI Design, Financial Modeling
- Machine Learning: XGBoost, Random Forest, Logistic Regression, SMOTE
- Programming: Python, SQL, R, VBA, REST APIs, LLM Integration
